allow: Bash(mkdir -p server/models server/routes server/middleware server/socket server/config)
Bash(mkdir -p client/src/pages client/src/components client/src/context client/src/hooks client/src/utils client/src/assets)

Bash(node -e "require\('./models/User'\); require\('./models/Swipe'\); require\('./models/Report'\); require\('./models/Match'\); require\('./models/Message'\); require\('./utils/mailer'\); console.log\('models ok'\);")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o BatchMode=yes iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'whoami && pwd')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'whoami; pwd; ls domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'whoami; pwd; ls ~/spark-repo/ 2>/dev/null | head -5')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'cd ~/spark-repo && git pull && bash deploy.sh')

Bash(ssh iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'ls ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/logs/ 2>/dev/null; ls ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/tmp/ 2>/dev/null; echo "---STDERR---"; tail -30 ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/logs/*error* 2>/dev/null; echo "---NODE STDERR---"; tail -30 ~/nodevenv/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/22/*.log 2>/dev/null; echo "---PASSENGER---"; find ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org -name "*.log" 2>/dev/null | head -5')

Bash(ssh iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'ls ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/; echo "---"; ls ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/ | head -15; echo "---SERVER PKG---"; cat ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/package.json 2>/dev/null | head -20')
Bash(ssh iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'ps aux | grep -iE "node|passenger" | grep -v grep | head -10')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'ls -la ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/ && echo "---" && ls -la ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/ | head -20 && echo "---SERVER HTACCESS---" && find ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org -maxdepth 3 -name ".htaccess" -exec echo "=== {} ===" \\; -exec cat {} \\;')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} from %{remote_ip}\\n" https://spark.proflowenergy.org/api/health; echo "---"; curl -sI https://spark.proflowenergy.org/api/health | head -20; echo "---"; ps -eo pid,etime,cmd | grep -i lsnode | grep -v grep')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'for path in /api/health /api/auth/login /socket.io/ /nonexistent-foo; do echo -n "$path => "; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" https://spark.proflowenergy.org$path; done')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'ls -la ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/tmp/ ; echo "---STDERR---"; find ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org -name "*.log" 2>/dev/null; echo "---PASSENGER LOG---"; ls -la ~/logs/ 2>/dev/null | head; ls ~/nodevenv/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/22/ 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'find / -path /proc -prune -o -name "passenger*.log" -print 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---"; find ~ -name "stderr.log" -o -name "error*.log" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---direct test---"; curl -sv http://127.0.0.1/api/health 2>&1 | head -30')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'echo "===app.proflowenergy.org public_html .htaccess==="; cat ~/domains/app.proflowenergy.org/public_html/.htaccess 2>/dev/null; echo ""; echo "===spark public_html .htaccess==="; cat ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/public_html/.htaccess; echo ""; echo "===app structure==="; ls ~/domains/app.proflowenergy.org/public_html/ | head')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'kill 2299731 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; ps -eo pid,etime,cmd | grep -i lsnode | grep -v grep; echo "---waking app---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" https://spark.proflowenergy.org/; sleep 3; echo "---new process---"; ps -eo pid,etime,cmd | grep -i lsnode | grep -v grep; echo "---api test---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" https://spark.proflowenergy.org/api/health')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'ls -la ~/nodevenv/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/22/ 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat ~/nodevenv/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/22/passenger.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no passenger.json"; echo "---httpd conf check---"; find /usr/local/directadmin -name "*spark*" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "---curl -v /api/health---"; curl -sv https://spark.proflowenergy.org/api/health 2>&1 | grep -iE "x-powered|server:|passenger|phusion|404|handler" | head')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'ps -eo pid,etime,cmd | grep -i lsnode | grep -v grep; echo "---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" https://spark.proflowenergy.org/api/health; echo "---app env---"; ls -la ~/nodevenv/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org/server/22/bin/ | head; echo "---stderr---"; find ~/domains/spark.proflowenergy.org -name "stderr.log" -o -name "*.log" 2>/dev/null; echo "---node app list---"; ls ~/nodevenv/domains/ 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh -p 22 iqraacad@da600.is.cc 'ps -eo pid,etime,cmd | grep -i lsnode | grep -v grep || echo "NO lsnode running"; echo "---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" https://spark.proflowenergy.org/api/health; sleep 3; ps -eo pid,etime,cmd | grep -i lsnode | grep -v grep || echo "still none"')
